headerTitle: Join the Canary Islands expat community
searchTitle: Find what you are looking for quickly
mainHeaderTitle: CanaryHub: Connect, share, and fully enjoy the Canary Islands
mainHeaderSubtitle: Services designed for expats in the Canary Islands
mainHeaderDescription: Welcome to CanaryHub, the essential platform for expats and residents in the Canary Islands. Find local services, job ads, accommodations tailored to your needs, and take part in unique events. Join a dynamic community of expats and locals to simplify your daily life and seize the best opportunities.
announcementsSubtitle: Easily find opportunities tailored to your needs and skills.
announcementsDescription: Access job and housing ads specially curated for expats. Quickly find opportunities that match your skills and start your new life in the Canary Islands with ease.
eventsSubtitle: Participate in gatherings and activities to build connections and explore your island.
eventsDescription: Join local events to meet other expats and residents, share experiences, and discover the hidden gems of the Canary Islands. Strengthen your network while enjoying enriching and friendly moments.
communitySubtitle: Join a community that suits you
communityDescription: CanaryHub is more than just a platform: it's a community of expats, locals, and visitors passionate about the Canary Islands. Share your experiences, exchange advice, find opportunities, and create lasting connections. Together, let's make your life in the Canary Islands a connected and enriching experience.
mainBenefit1: • Access thematic groups to discuss your interests.
mainBenefit2: • Connect directly with other members through our private messaging system.
mainBenefit3: • Receive notifications about the latest events, ads, and news.

inscription.pInscriptionSubtitle: Sign up and join our community
inscription.formDescriptionPasswordInscription: Must be at least 8 characters long, include an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
